positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of a whimsical forest animal family (fox, badger, owl) standing together in a mystical clearing. The scene is rendered in a clean, elegant silhouette style with visible line art detailing, evoking a fairytale book aesthetic. Strong contrast between the dark, stylized figures and a bright, luminous background of glowing flora and gentle magic. Composition must be centered and suitable for repeating seamless patterns or single apparel print. Colors should be muted jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) with strong black outlines, high detail on the animals' fur texture and facial expressions. Perfect for t-shirt printing, vector-style quality. --ar 1:1
negative: photorealistic, blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, low quality, noise, cropped, messy, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, graffiti, harsh shadows, realistic lighting
